title: Cobblemon Central
description: Modpack to play in server cobblemon central
body:
**jogar.cobblemoncentral.com** / _45.164.125.81:25655_ / beta test 11.12.2025
![Cobblemon Central Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f638209d99bf735346a0a7e06803dd447c6fbed7.png) Have a next-level experience with Cobblemon Multiplayer.
This modpack is **client-only** and exclusive to **playing on specific public servers**. It adds several customized menus that interact with the server (CentralBuilds, CentralCodes, …), includes optimization mods such as Sodium and FerriteCore, and also adds extra features for Cobblemon through MegaShowdown, CobbleStats, and more.
Check: [Galley](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-central/gallery) [Youtube Tutorials](https://www.youtube.com/@CobblemonCentral) / [Github page](https://github.com/cobblemoncentral)
Developers: Tlean07 & Nonopichy
